properties.name: crypto.enabled
properties.description: Whether the crypto auto-configuration activates and wires the provider registry, envelope codec, audit sink, DocumentSigner, and optional DefaultDocumentSigner capability.

properties.name: crypto.providers.jca.ed25519.enabled
properties.description: Whether the local JCA Ed25519 signature provider is registered.

properties.name: crypto.providers.jca.ecdsa-p256.enabled
properties.description: Whether the local JCA ECDSA P-256 signature provider is registered.

properties.name: crypto.local-ephemeral-keys.enabled
properties.description: Explicit local-development opt-in for process-local generated signing keys. Keep false outside local demos; production deployments bind key handles to app-owned key custody.
